summary: A Go-based modular tool for migrating, detecting, and running infrastructure validation assertions, originally built around Goss.
concerns: uncommitted changes (3 modified, 1 staged) may indicate instability
recent commits are heavily documentation and chore-focused, suggesting possible feature stagnation
tight coupling to Goss migration might limit future extensibility
scattered config directories (.claude, .gorchestra, GOrchestra) suggest evolving or inconsistent configuration management
suggestions: commit or stash the pending changes to establish a clean baseline
focus development on core features beyond documentation to progress past v0.6/v0.7
consolidate configuration directories into a single standard location
expand test coverage beyond the detected key files
